headline: CNBC Daily Open: Fresh Iran war worries halt stock rally
summary: Oil prices rise and markets fall after Netanyahu tells CNBC Israel and U.S. prepared to attack Iran again if necessary.

headline: EOG Resources Stock: Is EOG Underperforming the Energy Sector?
summary: Despite EOG Resources’ underperformance relative to the energy sector over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.
